calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for Jeremiah Casey.

Ms. McFadden stated that the English Attorney has been paid and that she was asking for fees in the work done to facilitate the English matter. The Court stated that it is inclined to cut extraordinary fees to the Executor. Ms. McFadden also stated that the Father (Former Executor) of the Executor has not asked for compensation, that he has not waived his compensation and that he is available to sign a waiver/declaration. The accounting petition was taken under submission pending receipt of a waiver.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clarke. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Continued To Nov-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution; Status Report Of Administration;Settlement Of First Account;Request For Allowance Of Late Filed Creditor'S Claim; Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Maureen McFadden for and with Jeremiah Casey (Petitioner). Suzanne McDonnell for Joseph Casey (Objector/Beneficiary). Ruth O'Neil appeared by CourtCall from London.

Ms. McDonnell stated her objections to Counsel appearing by phone from London. The Court stated its tentative thinking with regard to creditor's claims, extraordinary fees, apportionment of statutory fees and fees for London Counsel. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to creditor's claims and fees for London Counsel. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
